类的使用
com.easylive.web.annotation.GlobalInterceptor

  • 使用GlobalInterceptor的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    com.easylive.web.controller  

    • com.easylive.web.controller中GlobalInterceptor的使用

      注释类型为GlobalInterceptor的com.easylive.web.controller中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      ResponseVO UhomeController.cancelFocus(@NotEmpty String focusUserId) 
      ResponseVO VideoCommentController.cancelTopComment(@NotNull Integer commentId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.changeVideoSeriesSort(@NotNull String seriesIds) 
      ResponseVO VideoPlayHistoryController.cleanHistory() 
      ResponseVO UcenterInteractionController.delComment(@NotNull Integer commentId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterInteractionController.delDanmu(@NotNull Integer danmuId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.deleteVideo(@NotEmpty String videoId) 
      ResponseVO VideoPlayHistoryController.delHistory(@NotEmpty String videoId) 
      ResponseVO UserMessageController.delMessage(@NotNull Integer messageId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.delSeriesVideo(String userId, Integer seriesId, String videoId) 
      ResponseVO FileController.delUploadVideo(@NotEmpty String uploadId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.delVideoSeries(@NotNull Integer seriesId) 
      ResponseVO UserActionController.doAction(@NotEmpty String videoId, @NotNull Integer actionType, @Max(value=2L) @Min(value=1L) Integer actionCount, Integer commentId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeController.focus(@NotEmpty String focusUserId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterStatisticsController.getActualTimeStatisticsInfo() 
      ResponseVO UserMessageController.getNoReadCount() 
      ResponseVO UserMessageController.getNoReadCountGroup() 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.getVideoByVideoId(@NotEmpty String videoId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.getVideoCountInfo() 
      ResponseVO UcenterStatisticsController.getWeekStatisticsInfo(Integer dataType) 
      ResponseVO UcenterInteractionController.loadAllVideo() 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.loadAllVideo(Integer seriesId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterInteractionController.loadComment(Integer pageNo, String videoId) 
      ResponseVO UcenterInteractionController.loadDanmu(Integer pageNo, String videoId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeController.loadFansCount(Integer pageNo) 
      ResponseVO UhomeController.loadFocusList(Integer pageNo) 
      ResponseVO UserMessageController.loadMessage(@NotNull Integer messageType, Integer pageNo) 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.loadVideoPost(Integer status, Integer pageNo, String videoNameFuzzy) 
      ResponseVO VideoCommentController.postComment(@NotEmpty String videoId, @NotEmpty @Size(max=500) String content, Integer replyCommentId, @Size(max=50) String imgPath) 
      ResponseVO VideoPlayHistoryController.postDanmu(Integer pageNo) 
      ResponseVO VideoDanmuController.postDanmu(@NotEmpty String videoId, @NotEmpty String fileId, @NotEmpty @Size(max=200) String text, @NotNull Integer mode, @NotNull String color, @NotNull Integer time) 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.postVideo(String videoId, @NotEmpty String videoCover, @NotEmpty @Size(max=100) String videoName, @NotNull Integer pCategoryId, Integer categoryId, @NotNull Integer postType, @NotEmpty @Size(max=300) String tags, @Size(max=2000) String introduction, @Size(max=3) String interaction, @NotEmpty String uploadFileList) 
      ResponseVO FileController.preUploadVideo(@NotEmpty String fileName, @NotNull Integer chunks) 
      ResponseVO UserMessageController.readAll(@NotNull Integer messageType) 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.saveSeriesVideo(@NotNull Integer seriesId, @NotEmpty String videoIds) 
      ResponseVO UhomeController.saveTheme(@Min(value=1L) @Max(value=10L) @NotNull Integer theme) 
      ResponseVO UcenterVideoPostController.saveVideoInteraction(@NotEmpty String videoId, String interaction) 
      ResponseVO UhomeVideoSeriesController.saveVideoSeries(Integer seriesId, @NotEmpty @Size(max=100) String seriesName, @Size(max=200) String seriesDescription, String videoIds) 
      ResponseVO VideoCommentController.topComment(@NotNull Integer commentId) 
      ResponseVO UhomeController.updateUserInfo(@NotEmpty @Size(max=20) String nickName, @NotEmpty @Size(max=100) String avatar, @NotNull Integer sex, @Size(max=100) String birthday, @Size(max=150) String school, @Size(max=80) String personIntroduction, @Size(max=300) String noticeInfo) 
      ResponseVO FileController.uploadImage(@NotNull org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, @NotNull Boolean createThumbnail) 
      ResponseVO FileController.uploadVideo(@NotNull org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile chunkFile, @NotNull Integer chunkIndex, @NotEmpty String uploadId) 
      ResponseVO VideoCommentController.userDelComment(@NotNull Integer commentId)
